title: 道德行为 / Ethical Behavior
summary: 道德行为=诚实、公平、客观、保密,把客户利益置于个人之前;两难时以公平与客户利益、给出适当结果来决策。 / Ethical behavior means honesty, fairness, objectivity and confidentiality, putting the client’s interest before personal gain and deciding by fairness and a fair, suitable outcome for the client.

sections.heading: 核心要素
sections.body: 诚实(不欺瞒)、公平(一视同仁)、客观(不受不当影响)、保密(妥善保护客户信息)。

sections.heading: Core elements
sections.body: Honesty, fairness, objectivity (free from undue influence) and confidentiality (protect client information).

sections.heading: 客户优先
sections.body: 个人利益与客户冲突时,以客户利益为先;冲突避免或披露并管理。

sections.heading: Client first
sections.body: Where personal and client interests conflict, the client comes first; avoid or disclose and manage conflicts.

keyPoints: 客户利益优先于个人 / Client interest before personal gain
冲突避免或披露管理 / Avoid or disclose/manage conflicts
